title: Clairvoyance│千里眼
description: Allow the humanoid mob to see further.│讓人形生物可以看得更遠。
body:
# Function│功能
- Increased the base follow range of villagers, wandering traders, illagers, and witches to 256. This would allow the humanoid mobs to attack or sense danger from further away.│將村民、流浪商人、災厄村民、女巫的生物追蹤距離基值增加至256。這會使得這些人形生物能夠從更遠的地方發動攻擊或是察覺到危險。
